pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation - Cockpit feature includes GPS-based speedometer showing current speed in km/h or mph
Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation - Speed Limits feature displays speed limit sign on right side of screen during navigation, toggleable via Settings > Notifications > Speed Limits
Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation shows speedometer displays units in km/h or mph depending on View & Units distance unit setting
Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation - speedometer can display speed in imperial units (mph) when distance units are set to miles in View & Units
Sygic GPS Navigation displays current GPS-based speed; at startup or standstill, speedometer shows 0 km/h or 0 mph

pi_items.verified_value: Settings > Notifications > Speed Limits (for speed limit toggle); Settings > Cockpit (for speedometer minimization); Speed limit and current speed displays are NOT found in View & Units settings
pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation 24.3 official documentation: View & Units section contains only: Colour scheme, Buildings, Places on Map, Distance units, Time format, GPS Coordinates, Lock Rotation, Fullscreen, Map font size, Vehicle icon, and Automatic tunnel switch. Speed Limits toggle is in Notifications section. Speedometer (Cockpit) settings found in Cockpit section.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura) to enable Speedometer and Speed limit display overlays. The Speedometer is a GPS-based feature displaying current speed in km/h or mph (depending on View & Units distance unit settings), showing '0' at startup/standstill. The Speed limit feature displays the speed limit sign on the screen. However, the task's claimed settings path is partially incorrect: the Speed limit display toggle is actually located at Settings > Notifications > Speed Limits (not View & Units), while speedometer controls are in Settings > Cockpit. The View & Units section contains only display customization options (color scheme, buildings, places, distance units, time format, GPS coordinates, lock rotation, fullscreen, map font size, vehicle icon, tunnel switch) and does not include speedometer or speed limit toggles.
